'''pasojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecopexy|cecopexy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecopexy|cecopexy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pasojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæsejeth|pæsejeth]] || [[word:pæsejej|pæsejej]] || [[word:pæsejesh|pæsejesh]] || [[word:pæseje|pæseje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasosojoth|pasosojoth]] || [[word:pasosojoj|pasosojoj]] || [[word:pasosojosh|pasosojosh]] || [[word:pasosojo|pasosojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasojoth|pasojoth]] || [[word:pasojoj|pasojoj]] || [[word:pasojosh|pasojosh]] || [[word:pasojo|pasojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasofjoth|pasofjoth]] || [[word:pasofjoj|pasofjoj]] || [[word:pasofjosh|pasofjosh]] || [[word:pasofjof|pasofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pasojotho|pasojotho]] || [[word:pasojojo|pasojojo]] || [[word:pasojosho|pasojosho]] || [[word:pasojoko|pasojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pasojoth|pasojoth]] || [[word:pasojoj|pasojoj]] || [[word:pasojosh|pasojosh]] || [[word:pasojo|pasojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pasojothol|pasojothol]] || [[word:pasojojol|pasojojol]] || [[word:pasojoshol|pasojoshol]] || [[word:pasojokol|pasojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pasojothotho|pasojothotho]] || [[word:pasojojojo|pasojojojo]] || [[word:pasojoshosho|pasojoshosho]] || [[word:pasojoko|pasojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pasojothon|pasojothon]] || [[word:pasojojon|pasojojon]] || [[word:pasojoshon|pasojoshon]] || [[word:pasojokon|pasojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pasojothoro|pasojothoro]] || [[word:pasojojoro|pasojojoro]] || [[word:pasojoshoro|pasojoshoro]] || [[word:pasojokoro|pasojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
